subject: Welcome. You're here, and that's enough.
preview_text: A quiet space for self-awareness and emotional growth.
body:
Thank you for joining The Genuine Love Project.

This is a quiet space — not a content machine. We share gentle reflections and wellness tools when they feel ready.

If you'd like to explore, here are some starting points:
- Mood Check-In: A private emotional awareness tracker
- Journal Prompts: Reflective prompts rooted in care
- Daily Wisdom: A quiet thought to sit with

Everything is optional. Everything is at your pace.
safety_note: This platform is for educational wellness purposes only. If you need immediate support, call or text 988.
disclaimer: The Genuine Love Project is not therapy or medical advice.

subject: A few things you might like (no pressure).
preview_text: Some gentle tools you can try whenever you're ready.
body:
Hi again,

We wanted to share a few things you might find helpful — whenever the timing feels right.

The Journal is a private space where you can write freely. No one sees it but you. Some people find that just putting words on a page helps them process what they're feeling.

The Daily Reflection offers one gentle question each day. You can answer it, sit with it, or skip it entirely.

Both are available whenever you'd like. No streaks, no scores, no performance.
safety_note: If you're going through something difficult, support is always available at /crisis.
disclaimer: Educational content only. Not a substitute for professional care.

subject: You don't have to do anything with this.
preview_text: Just a quiet check-in from The Genuine Love Project.
body:
Hi,

This is the last email in our welcome series. After this, you'll only hear from us when we have something meaningful to share — roughly once a week.

Here's what we believe: you don't have to do anything with this platform. You don't have to log in every day. You don't have to complete anything.

But if you ever want a quiet moment of reflection, a place to write, or a gentle reminder that you're not alone — it's here.

That's it. That's the whole thing.

Take care of yourself.
safety_note: Crisis support is always available. Call or text 988, or text HOME to 741741.
disclaimer: The Genuine Love Project is an educational platform, not therapy.
